backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a DuckDuckGo search function via HTTP outcalls, constructing the API URL and trapping with a descriptive error if the outcall fails.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (useSearch hook, SearchInterface, InAppBrowser, dark theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and a module script tag loading the React app entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal overlay component that renders an iframe for in-app URL browsing, with a header bar, loading spinner, close button, and fallback external-link button.
Main search UI component with a form, loading/error/empty states, flattened DuckDuckGo RelatedTopics rendered as cards, and integration with InAppBrowser for opening result links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider that manages Internet Identity authentication state, exposing login/clear functions and status flags via an AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that calls the backend actor's `search` function with a URL-encoded query, validates the JSON response, extracts meaningful error messages from ICP canister traps, and exposes `searchResults`, `isLoading`, `error`, and `performSearch` to consumers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes, plus a `fadeIn` animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility module providing `linkifyText` to convert URLs in a string into clickable `<a>` tags or callback-driven `<button>` elements, and `isUrl` to validate whether a string is a valid URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends border radius, box shadow, and font family, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking existing implemented features (useSearch hook, SearchInterface, InAppBrowser, theming) and one pending backend task (AR-1) to implement a Motoko actor that performs HTTP outcalls to the DuckDuckGo API.
